description: A contextual, non-blocking dark overlay that surfaces a brief message near a UI element. Five arrow positions. No interactive states on the container.

arrowVariants.description: Dark rounded background. Carries padding, border-radius, and gap between text and close icon.
Single body string. 14px Manrope Medium, line-height 1.4, max-width 240px.
24×24px Customer-Icon/x-close-delete. Allows user to dismiss the tooltip.
24×12px directional polygon. Rotated to point in the configured direction. Color matches container background.

noArrowVariant.description: Dark rounded background. Same background and border-radius as arrow variants.
14px Manrope Bold, line-height 1.2. Short label summarising the content.
14px Manrope Regular, line-height 1.2. Explanatory body text.

variants.description: Arrow points right. Tooltip is to the left of its target element.
Arrow points left. Tooltip is to the right of its target element.
Arrow points down. Tooltip is above its target element.
Arrow points up. Tooltip is below its target element.
No arrow. Two-level text structure: bold title + regular body. No dismiss icon — dismissal is programmatic.

arrow.note: Polygon asset. Color matches container background. Rotation applied per variant.

states.name: Visible
states.description: Mounted and displayed near its target element.

states.name: Dismissed
states.description: Unmounted or hidden. Arrow variants: triggered by close icon. no_arrow: programmatic.

relatedComponents.name: Snackbar
relatedComponents.when: Recoverable issues with a quick action.

notes: Confirmed real-world usage: arrow_position=right — 'Sharing live location with your driver to help them find you' — Customer App home screen during active ride. Node 763:5077.
Customer App uses token --surface/neutral/bg-invert; DS Core uses --surface/neutral/invert. Same value (#1d1d23), different token name — needs alignment.
The no_arrow variant is structurally distinct: bold title + regular body, no close icon, no arrow.
Arrow is a polygon image asset, not a CSS triangle. Rotation is applied per direction.
TODO: Confirm keyboard trigger and dismiss behavior.
TODO: Confirm touch/tap trigger mechanism for mobile.
